items.title: Outside of the Fever's big-three, they have just 5 made shots tonight. Billings is three of those. Need more from depth late, among other improvements.

Outside of the Fever's big-three, they have just 5 made shots tonight. Billings is three of those. Need more from depth late, among other improvements.

It's 63-60 going into the fourth quarter.

items.title: Final 6:06 of the first half, Fever held the Sun to 1/11 shooting and forced 2 turnovers. Defense tightened up. Clark, Mitchell, and Boston have 34 points, nearly matching Connecticut alone.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Final 6:06 of the first half, Fever held the Sun to 1/11 shooting and forced 2 turnovers. Defense tightened up. Clark, Mitchell, and Boston have 34 points, nearly matching Connecticut alone.

It's 47-38 at the break.

items.title: Fever leading Sun 47-38 at the half, holding Connecticut to just 9pts in the 2Q
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever leading Sun 47-38 at the half, holding Connecticut to just 9pts in the 2Q

Mitchell has 15pts, Clark with 12. Team turnover (8) was high.

One understated trait of this team is their rebounding. Improved — and leading the league in DREB%.

items.title: Maybe not relevant but Spurs are 5-0 in Finals Game 5s:
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt:
Maybe not relevant but Spurs are 5-0 in Finals Game 5s:
98-99, Won in NY 78-77 (clinched series 4-1)
02-03, Won in NJ 93-83 (went up 3-2)
04-05, Won in DET 96-95 (went up 3-2)
12-13, Won at home v MIami 114-104 (went up 3-2)
13-14, Won at home v Miami 104-87 (clinched series 4-1)

Started 4/4 from 3
Since: 1/8

And thus, it's tied at 36.

items.title: Weird thing about following around a team that has made a habit of getting down huge and coming back to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat: My fingertips for what to expect are completely shot at this point. Knicks by 30? Sure. Spurs by 40? OK. One-possession game full of mir
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: Weird thing about following around a team that has made a habit of getting down huge and coming back to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat: My fingertips for what to expect are completely shot at this point. Knicks by 30? Sure. Spurs by 40? OK. One-possession game full of miracle/calamity? Yep.
